name: Stir-Fried Bean Sprouts and Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried mushrooms in boiling water for 20 minutes; drain and discard stems, chop caps finely.
2. Wash and drain the bean sprouts, slice shallots diagonally.
3. Heat oil in a wok, add garlic and cook until fragrant.
4. Add mushrooms and sliced shallots to the wok, stir-fry for about 1 minute.
5. Add bean sprouts to the wok, toss everything together until well combined.
6. Stir in oyster sauce, light soy sauce, dry sherry, cornflour, and water.
7. Continue stir-frying until the mixture boils and thickens.
Compiled by Imran C.
